== Notes for [[Item:Q104982|Q104982]] ==

According to "Méritos del Capitan y Sargento Mayor Don Pedro Perez Polanco", Ines Martinez Mejia was a resident of La Vega where she died in 1604.

She is likely to be the aunt of an Alonso Mexia who appears in the census of 1604 along with Pedro Polanco de Henao as resident of La Vega. Alonso Mexia was Alcalde Ordinario of La Vega in 1640 along with his probable cousin Pedro Polanco de Henao who was Alguacil Mayor of La Vega in that same year.

In 1604, Ines Mexia was the owner of the Hato of San Bartolome in El Seibo. There is a possibility that the hato of Barbarroja that belonged to the Campuzano Polanco brothers was inherited by them through their great great grandmother Ines Martinez Mexia.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000064525684882

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
